name: codex-orchestrator
description: Multi-agent orchestration for high-stakes Codex coding work.

interface.longDescription: Orchestrate high-stakes coding: keep Codex as architect, delegate bounded work to sub-agents or optional external CLIs, and verify evidence. Prefer explicit $codex-orchestrator.
defaultPrompt: Use $codex-orchestrator to orchestrate this task: plan, delegate bounded work, and verify evidence.
